Package de.uka.ilkd.key.strategy.feature

Class AbstractBetaFeature

java.lang.Object
de.uka.ilkd.key.strategy.feature.AbstractBetaFeature
All Implemented Interfaces:
Feature
Direct Known Subclasses:
ContainsQuantifierFeature, CountMaxDPathFeature, CountPosDPathFeature, LeftmostNegAtomFeature, PurePosDPathFeature, SimplifyBetaCandidateFeature
public abstract class AbstractBetaFeature extends Object implements Feature
This abstract class contains some auxiliary methods for the selection of beta rules that are supposed to be applied. Used terminology is defined in Diss. by Martin Giese.

    • alwaysReplace

      public static boolean alwaysReplace(Term p_t)
      Returns:
      true iff the sign of "p_t" is not relevant (quantifiers etc. could be positive or negative)

    • isBetaCandidate

      protected static boolean isBetaCandidate(Term p_t, boolean p_inAntec, ServiceCaches caches)
      Parameters:
      caches - TODO
      Returns:
      true iff the formula p_t could be splitted using the beta rule

    • computeCost

      public RuleAppCost computeCost(RuleApp app, PosInOccurrence pos, Goal goal)
      Compute the cost of a RuleApp.
      Specified by:
      computeCost in interface Feature
      Parameters:
      app - the RuleApp
      pos - position where app is to be applied
      goal - the goal on which app is to be applied
      Returns:
      the cost of app
